vertical_decoupling.definition: 控制平面 (control plane) ↔ 执行平面 (execution plane) 协议中立解耦
vertical_decoupling.1st_party_evidence: Apple Xcode 26.3 + Claude Agent SDK + getsentry/XcodeBuildMCP
vertical_decoupling.paradigm_analogy: 2010 年代云计算从「私有 API」走向「OpenStack / Kubernetes」

horizontal_decoupling.definition: 多个 control plane (Claude Code + Codex CLI) ↔ 同一个 Skill + execution plane
horizontal_decoupling.protocol_basis: agentskills/agentskills vendor-neutral Skill spec (16+ 客户端支持)
horizontal_decoupling.paradigm_analogy: 编程语言从「平台绑定」走向「跨平台字节码」（Java → JVM）

cross_device_coordination.definition: 多端 harness (mobile / desktop / cloud) 通过会话状态协议交接
cross_device_coordination.1st_party_evidence: Cursor iOS Mobile-Cloud Hybrid Harness + SeemSeam/CCB v8.0.15
cross_device_coordination.protocol_basis: append-only telemetry + cache-first architecture + rewind retry (4 primitives)
cross_device_coordination.paradigm_analogy: 分布式系统从「RPC」走向「事件溯源 / CQRS」

planning_primitive_cross_dimension.definition: vendor-neutral plan + completion gate + file-based working state 三合一协议
planning_primitive_cross_dimension.1st_party_evidence: OthmanAdi/planning-with-files 24,583 ⭐ v3.2.0 + Anthropic: Harness Design for Long-Running Apps + Meta REA
planning_primitive_cross_dimension.protocol_basis: SKILL.md 协议 + PreCompact/Stop hook + file-based plan + completion gate
planning_primitive_cross_dimension.paradigm_analogy: Anthropic 1st-party Long-Running Agent Harness 命题的开源实现
